name: Stable Beluga 1 (FreeWilly 1) 65B
license: CC BY-NC-4.0 (Non-Commercial Creative Commons License) — released as delta weights over Meta's LLaMA 65B
archDisplay: LLaMA 65B dense Transformer, Orca-style supervised fine-tune
note: Ranked #4 on the HF Open LLM Leaderboard at launch (Jul 27 2023); released as delta weights over Meta's LLaMA 65B.
verificationNotes: CONFIRMED real via HF model card raw README (stabilityai/StableBeluga1-Delta) and Stability AI's blog post (published Jul 21 2023, updated Jul 28): LLaMA-65B base, Orca-style SFT, delta-weight release, ranked #4 on HF Open LLM Leaderboard as of Jul 27 2023 — matches the note. CORRECTED license: the HF README literally states 'Fine-tuned checkpoints (StableBeluga1) is licensed under the Non-Commercial Creative Commons license (CC BY-NC-4.0)' — this is NOT the 'Stable Beluga Non-Commercial Community License' (that named license applies only to Beluga 2). Context length (2048) is the standard LLaMA-1 architecture value; the HF card itself states no explicit max-sequence-length. DROPPED the sole result row (MMLU 64.83, sourceUrl llm.extractum.io): that URL fails TLS certificate validation (hostname mismatch — the domain now resolves to an unrelated site, ag3ntum.com) and no alternate source could be found confirming this exact figure, so it was removed per the no-unconfirmed-numbers rule.
